label: Security
description: Risk involving access control, authentication, authorization, abuse, or exploitability.

label: Quality
description: Risk involving broken behaviour, incomplete requirements, regression, or reliability.

label: Privacy
description: Risk involving personal data exposure, incorrect data handling, or unclear user-data behaviour.

label: Operations
description: Risk involving deployment, monitoring, rollback, configuration, or production support.

label: Testing
description: Risk involving missing, weak, or incomplete validation before release.
